calendar.matters:
ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Osc For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Sep-11-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for hearing on a name change. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Leticia Perez. There being no appearance by the petitioner, the court ordered the matter off calendar.

Name Change Petition On Calendar In Scd 218 At 9:00 A.M. On August 15, 2002.
Off Calendar Aug-15-2002 Granted Per Written Order
